_doc: How-Is-Session aspects. Edit freely — adding an aspect requires zero schema or code change. Each aspect: { aliases?: string[], hint?: string }. Buckets are organizational only; ratings store the canonical key as a string. Unknown keys submitted via the CLI still pass through (lean).

understood_claude.hint: did the human understand claude's plan/output

understood_human.hint: did claude understand the human's intent

friction_claude_infra.hint: friction between claude and infrastructure (db, services, network)

friction_claude_devenv.hint: friction between claude and dev env (tooling, shell, CLIs)

friction_human_app.hint: friction between the human and the app being built

gap_app_vs_code.hint: gap between app behavior and the code reality

gap_code_vs_spec.hint: gap between code reality and spec

gap_intent_vs_outcome.hint: gap between what was asked and what shipped

vibe.hint: overall session vibe — high-signal subjective read
